title: AI Batch Banner Generation for E-Commerce: Canva, Gaoding, Alimama — The Complete Guide
excerpt: Testing Canva Magic Design, Gaoding AI, and Alimama Creative Center — learn to mass-produce e-commerce ad creatives at scale
content:
One of the most painful jobs in e-commerce operations is creating images. During major sales events, a single store needs dozens or even hundreds of banners and ad creatives. For a Double 11 event, a flagship store needs at least 200+素材. Outsourcing design costs $7-$28 per image, with long communication cycles. Doing it yourself often looks unprofessional if you lack design skills.

AI design tools have matured enough to make batch image generation a reality. In 2026, the three主流 AI design tools are Canva, Gaoding Design, and Alimama Creative Center. I spent three weeks testing large-scale batch image generation on all three platforms using the same product素材. I compared them on speed, design quality, brand consistency, and cost.

This article is a step-by-step tutorial, not a vague overview. For each tool, I give the complete workflow from registration to export. At the end, I provide clear comparison data and recommendations.

![](/images/ecommerce-package.jpg)

## Why You Need AI Batch Banner Generation

E-commerce ad creatives update at an insane频率. For a Tmall flagship store, daily operations need: storefront banners, secondary page headers, direct traffic images, super-recommendation images, Taojinbi images, Juhuasuan images, and more. Every major promotion needs preheating and official versions — two sets. Making all these sizes manually is an enormous workload.

AI batch generation's core value comes down to two formulas. Time cost: 30 minutes per image manually vs 30 seconds with AI — 60x efficiency gain. Cost comparison: $14 per outsourced image vs a $14/month AI tool subscription with unlimited usage. For any seller of any scale, AI batch generation is a must-have skill.

But AI isn't magic. AI-generated images still need human quality control, especially for brand tone and design style consistency. My advice: let AI handle the volume, humans handle the quality. Use AI to cover 80% of daily needs, and focus human effort on the 20% of high-requirement creatives.

## Canva Magic Design Tested: Most Templates, International Solution

Canva's Magic Design feature was fully upgraded in late 2025. Now you upload a product image, enter product name and promotion info, and AI automatically generates banners in multiple sizes covering everything from Taobao main images (800x800) to livestream covers (1920x1080) and social media posts.

My test: I uploaded a Bluetooth earbud product image with a "Summer Cool Shopping Festival" theme. Canva's AI first识别the product主体, then auto-removes the background. Next, it generates multiple design sets based on the theme's color palette. I counted about 30 different banner styles.

Canva's strength is the sheer volume of design templates — over 1 million commercial templates covering every category and promotion event. The AI learns最佳 layouts from these templates and applies them to your product. Generated banners are professionally proportioned and colored — barely any adjustments needed.

Downside: domestic Chinese access speed can be不稳定. Also, templates are English-dominated — for domestic e-commerce, you need to replace English labels with Chinese. Batch export in the free version is limited to 50 images at a time; paid version is unlimited but costs $12.99/month.

Canva's **Brand Kit** feature is very helpful for e-commerce batch generation. You can preset your brand colors, font combinations, logo placement, and design guidelines. All AI-generated banners automatically follow your brand specs for consistent style. This is crucial for maintaining brand identity.

## Gaoding Design Tested: Best Solution for Domestic E-Commerce

Gaoding Design is the leader in domestic Chinese e-commerce design tools. Its AI batch generation feature is called "Smart Design." Upload products and activity info, select template groups, and一键生成all store素材. My tests show Gaoding outperforms Canva in domestic e-commerce scenarios.

Gaoding's template library is built specifically for Chinese e-commerce platforms. Tmall's 750x320 banners, Taobao's 800x800 main images, Pinduoduo livestream covers — all尺寸are built in. No manual resizing needed — it auto-adapts to each platform's specs. This alone saves tons of repetitive layout work.

Workflow is simple. Step 1: Click "Smart Design" to create a new project. Step 2: Select your platform (Tmall, Taobao, etc.). Step 3: Choose the activity type (618, Double 11, daily new arrivals, etc.). Step 4: Upload product images and enter activity title and selling points. Step 5: AI auto-generates a full set of banners adapted to each size. Takes about 3 minutes total.

My favorite Gaoding feature: **Smart Cutout + Scene Compositing.** Upload a white-background product image — the AI cuts it out and seamlessly composites it with preset promotional backgrounds. For example, place the Bluetooth earbuds on a blue gradient promotional background, add discount tags and copy. Compositing quality is high with clean edge cutting.

Pricing: Gaoding Enterprise version is 198 RMB/month. Team features support collaboration and permission management. One-click export of all尺寸banners in PNG and JPG. For stores with 2-5 person design teams, this is the best value option.

## Alimama Creative Center Tested: First Pick for Tmall Sellers

Alimama Creative Center is Alibaba's official smart design platform. If you run a Taobao or Tmall store, this tool deserves priority consideration. Its AI generation engine connects directly to the Alimama ad system — generated images can be used directly in direct traffic and super-recommendation campaigns.

Alimama's most unique feature is **Smart Copy + Smart Visual** dual AI drive. You just enter the product ID and core selling points — the AI automatically extracts info from your product detail page. Then visual AI generates the banner and copy AI generates promotional text and benefit points. You don't need to write a single word.

Another exclusive advantage: **high-quality creative prediction.** Alimama's AI predicts which design style will have the highest CTR and conversion rate based on historical ad data. It优先recommends designs predicted to perform best. This data-driven recommendation engine is backed by Alibaba platform big data, saving you from wrong design directions.

Workflow: Step 1: Open Alimama Creative Center and link your store. Step 2: Select "Smart Creative" and enter the product link. Step 3: AI auto-fetches product info and generates multiple creative options. Step 4: Select the best-predicted option and一键submit to your ad group. All done within Alimama's backend.

Downside: Alimama only supports Alibaba ecosystem (Taobao/Tmall). If you sell on Pinduoduo, Douyin, or independent stores, this tool won't work. Also, its design style is standardized and lacks creative个性 — if you want unique banner visuals, you'll still need human designers.

Pricing: currently **free**. As an official platform tool, Alimama Creative Center is free for Tmall/Taobao sellers. It's effectively a zero-cost, high-return tool.

## Three Tools Compared

Here's a comprehensive comparison. **Design freedom:** Canva is highest — layouts and elements are freely adjustable. Gaoding is medium — supports template modification but not from-scratch creation. Alimama is lowest — mostly templated output.

**Platform adaptation:** Gaoding covers most — Taobao, Tmall, JD, Pinduoduo, Douyin. Canva is next — mainly international platforms. Alimama only covers Alibaba ecosystem.

**Batch speed:** All three are similar — minutes to generate dozens of images. But Alimama's auto-extraction of product info saves manual entry time, giving it a slight edge.

**Brand consistency:** Canva's Brand Kit is most comprehensive. Gaoding supports brand presets but less detailed. Alimama doesn't support brand customization.

**Cost:** Canva $12.99/month, Gaoding 198 RMB/month, Alimama free.

**Final recommendation:** If you're on Alibaba ecosystem, use all three — Alimama for ad images, Gaoding for main images, Canva for international versions of your素材.

![](/images/ops-collage.jpg)

## Setting Up Your Batch Production Workflow

Here's the daily workflow I use. **Step 1: Build a product素材library.** Every product needs at least three images: clean white front view, close-up detail shot, usage scenario shot. Name them as "product name_type_date" for easy AI recognition and retrieval.

**Step 2: Build a copy template library.** Each product needs 3 core selling points, 1 promotion offer, and 1 call-to-action. Store this copy in a standardized document for easy copy-paste when generating. Templates save you from starting from scratch each time.

**Step 3:** Create a project in Gaoding, select template group, upload product images and copy. Click "一键生成" and wait 2-3 minutes. Review results, manually adjust any that need it, and regenerate if needed.

**Step 4:** Export and organize. Save files in platform-specific folders. Name convention: "event name_platform_size" — good naming habits save you tons of time finding images later.

**Step 5:** A/B test. Launch different AI-generated banner styles into your ad campaigns simultaneously. After 24 hours, use CTR data to淘汰underperformers and keep winners. Save the winning style as a preset for future use.

## AI Generation Strategy by Campaign Type

**Daily new arrivals** don't need fancy design. Use Gaoding's clean templates that let the product shine. Keep copy simple — new arrival + core selling point. Let the product be the star; too much decoration distracts.

**Major promotions** need bold, attention-grabbing styles. Recommend Canva's promotional templates with warm tones (reds, oranges). Copy should include discount level, time limit, and inventory urgency. The goal is to push hesitant buyers to checkout.

**Brand campaigns** need high-quality, tasteful designs. Use Canva here for maximum design freedom. Place your brand logo prominently and use your brand's color palette. Have a human review AI output to ensure brand tone stays on track.

**Livestream banners** need to highlight broadcast time and offers. Use Gaoding's livestream cover templates for quick generation. These templates prioritize text over images, so viewers scrolling by can catch key info at a glance. Keep copy concise and highly readable.

## Post-Generation Checklist

AI batch generation is fast, but don't use images directly without checking these:

**Font licensing.** Many AI template fonts need commercial licenses. Using them without authorization could lead to infringement claims. Replace all text in AI-generated images with fonts you've licensed. Recommended free commercial fonts: Source Han Sans, Alibaba PuHuiTi.

**Image copyright.** Background elements and images in AI-generated graphics also need copyright confirmation. Canva's paid templates include commercial usage rights, but I still recommend avoiding clearly sourced photography as backgrounds to minimize risk.

**Resolution check.** AI-generated banner resolution can sometimes be off. Check each size individually to ensure it meets platform requirements. Tmall banners generally need 72dpi+ for清晰度.

**Copy verification.** AI-generated promotional copy might contain不规范 expressions or conflict with store policies. "50% off everything" when some items are excluded would cause issues. Always manually verify copy accuracy to avoid customer complaints and platform penalties.

## Training AI to Generate More On-Brand Banners

You can improve AI design style through "feeding" training. First, manually design a set of standard brand banners as a reference sample. Then preset the color scheme, font combination, and layout style into the tool. All subsequent AI-generated banners will reference this sample.

Building a **brand asset library** is also critical. Upload your logo, brand colors,常用 icons, watermarks and other素材 into the tool's asset management backend. When AI generates, it automatically calls these assets — the output carries brand identity elements. This takes some initial setup time, but once done, it works forever.

Ongoing collection of great banner design examples can also level up your design capabilities. When you see good banner designs, save them and use the tool's "style learning" feature to have AI mimic them. Over time, AI output will increasingly match your aesthetic.

## Summary and Recommendations

Three tools for different needs. **Canva** for high design freedom with the strongest brand consistency and best international support. **Gaoding** is the best choice for daily batch generation — highest domestic e-commerce adaptation and one-stop multi-platform coverage. **Alimama Creative Center** is a zero-cost high-efficiency solution for Alibaba ecosystem sellers with integrated ad delivery.

Recommended combination: Daily new arrivals and regular promotions → use Gaoding for一键generation of full store素材. Alibaba ecosystem ad campaigns → use Alimama Creative Center for data-driven ad creative optimization. Brand campaigns and international promotions → use Canva for high-quality design and brand image management.

AI batch generation isn't about fully replacing designers — it's about giving every e-commerce seller the ability to achieve what only big teams could do before. With these three tools, one person generating hundreds of images a day isn't fantasy — it's reality within reach.

![](/images/shopify-free.jpg)
